name: SurveySparrow
description: SurveySparrow conversational survey platform for employee and customer experience

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to SurveySparrow
2. Go to Settings → Apps & Integrations → API Token
3. Generate or copy your API token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: SurveySparrow → Settings → Apps & Integrations → API Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists SurveySparrow contacts to verify employee survey access
